data.title: Nxera Pharma forms Metabolic Advisory Council to develop treatments for obesity, metabolic disorders.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Nxera Pharma Co. Ltd, a company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange under the code 4565, declared the establishment of a Metabolic Advisory Council in collaboration with experts from Tokyo and Cambridge. This council aims to offer scientific, clinical, and strategic advice to Nxera as they progress their expanding portfolio of innovative treatments focused on addressing obesity and metabolic issues.

data.title: Filoplumes, small yet powerful feathers, support flights covering thousands of miles in nature's design.
data.description: Tiny filoplumes play a crucial role in facilitating nonstop flights covering distances of thousands of miles.

data.title: Houlihan Lokey acquires a controlling interest in Audere Partners, French firm, to strengthen European platform. #NYSE #business #investment
data.description: Houlihan Lokey, Inc., a global investment bank listed on NYSE as HLI, recently revealed two key transactions aimed at bolstering its European presence and enriching its global Corporate Finance business. The firm has finalized an agreement to acquire a majority stake in Audere Partners, a renowned French corporate finance entity known as Natixis Partners. This move represents a significant development for Houlihan Lokey as it seeks to expand its capabilities, marking a strategic step forward in its growth trajectory.

data.title: Automation Anywhere and OpenAI collaborate on AI-native agentic solutions for enterprises. Launch on Jan. 20, 2026.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, in San Jose, California, Automation Anywhere, a top provider of Agentic Process Automation (APA) and agentic solutions, revealed a cutting-edge set of AI-native agentic solutions in partnership with OpenAI. These innovative solutions are geared towards aiding enterprises in accomplishing their goals and boosting productivity.

data.title: Jon Peddie Research releases report on booming AI processor market with 120 startups involved.
data.description: A new report by Jon Peddie Research (JPR) based in Tiburon, Calif., highlights the rapid expansion of the AI processor market as of Jan. 20, 2026. The analysis conducted by JPR founder and president Dr. Jon Peddie reveals significant growth in the sector. With 120 startups having entered the market, the surge in interest in AI processors showcases a remarkable trend.

data.title: "Fox Haven Roofing and 'All Access with Andy Garcia' showcase AI in contracting. Open-source ERP systems revolutionize roofing. LOS ANGELES, Jan. 20, 2026"
data.description: A recent educational segment explores the transformative impact of open-source ERP systems on the roofing industry in enhancing project management and efficiency. This development was highlighted in Los Angeles on Jan. 20, 2026. It showcases the fusion of traditional roofing practices with advanced data science, leading to significant improvements in project operations. This innovative approach signifies a notable shift towards more streamlined and effective project management techniques within the roofing sector.

data.title: Nuvoton begins mass production of 1.0 W 379 nm UV laser, setting new industry standard for optical output.
data.description: In Kyoto, Japan, on January 20, 2026, Nuvoton Technology Corporation Japan (NTCJ) revealed the commencement of mass production for their high-power ultraviolet semiconductor laser. This laser operates at 379 nm and generates 1.0 W of power, setting a new standard for optical output in its category. This compact laser measures 9.0-mm in size, showcasing significant advancements in laser technology.

data.title: Infosys is the fastest growing IT services brand globally with a 15% CAGR in brand value, ranking in top 3 most valuable brands in the world.
data.description: Announcement from Davos, Switzerland on Jan. 20, 2026: Infosys, a leading provider of digital services and consulting, has been ranked as one of the top 3 most valuable IT services brands in the world. This recognition places Infosys among the top 100 brands across all categories in terms of brand strength. Trading under symbols NSE: INFY, BSE: INFY, and NYSE: INFY, Infosys continues to establish itself as a global leader in next-generation digital solutions.

data.title: Starlight Investments' 60-storey Trinity Heights in Manchester tops out, delivering 532 rental homes. #milestone
data.description: In an important step towards completing the construction of one of Manchester's notable build-to-rent projects, Starlight Investments has achieved a milestone by topping out Trinity Heights. This development comprises 532 premium rental homes and stands tall at 60 storeys. The progress signifies a significant advancement in the delivery of this prominent project located in MANCHESTER, United Kingdom.

data.description: South Korea-based Alteogen Inc. (KOSDAQ: 196170) revealed on Jan. 20, 2026, the signing of an exclusive license deal with Tesaro, Inc., a subsidiary of GSK. The agreement grants Tesaro global rights for a specified purpose.

VINCI acquires Fletcher Construction, expanding presence in New Zealand. Major development in the industry.

data.title: Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson criticizes Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse for not opposing new crypto bill draft.
data.description: Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson criticized Ripple Labs CEO Brad Garlinghouse for not opposing the current draft of the cryptocurrency market structure bill. In a live stream, Hoskinson expressed anger towards Garlinghouse for not challenging the latest version, which is viewed by many as benefiting banks over decentralized finance. Garlinghouse, on the other hand, commended the Senate Banking Committee for offering "workable frameworks" for the crypto industry and favored clarity over chaos. He remained hopeful that issues would be resolved during the markup process. Hoskinson urged Garlinghouse to fight for what's right instead of settling for chaos, emphasizing that it's not an improvement.

data.title: E3 Lithium submits Directive 056 Facility Licence Application for Clearwater Project in Alberta; significant milestone reached.
data.description: E3 Lithium Ltd., a Canadian company specializing in lithium development, has officially applied to the Alberta Energy Regulator for its Clearwater Project’s Central Processing Facility. This submission is in accordance with Directive 056 and marks a significant milestone for the company's flagship project in Alberta. E3 Lithium Ltd.'s stock symbols are TSXV: ETL, FSE: OW3, and OTCQX: EEMMF. This move demonstrates the company's commitment to advancing its operations in the region.

data.title: G42 launches Digital Embassies & Greenshield for portable AI sovereignty. Enables governments to deploy AI globally with legal control.
data.description: In a recent announcement at the World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, G42 has revealed a groundbreaking Digital Embassies framework along with Greenshield. This innovative model empowers governments to promptly utilize AI technology while maintaining complete legal jurisdiction, oversight, and security over their global infrastructure. The launch took place on January 20, 2026, marking a significant step in enabling quick deployment of AI solutions. This development promises to revolutionize the way governments approach technology, with G42 spearheading the initiative.

data.title: ALGO price may hit $0.16-$0.19 in 6 weeks despite $0.12 consolidation. Analysts predict 33-58% upside. RSI at 40.40, MACD bearish.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Algorand (ALGO) is currently trading at $0.12 with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 40.40. Various analysts predict a potential increase of 33-58%, projecting a target range of $0.16-$0.19 within the next 4-6 weeks. This optimistic outlook comes despite the bearish momentum indicated by the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD).
